conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt a particularly strong connection with I, E, and B, as we bonded deeply over our shared family-driven motivations and the intense pressure of the stakes. With E and B specifically, we moved beyond just sharing stories and established a sense of mutual support, agreeing to look out for each other as allies once the game starts. In contrast, I felt the least connected to C; while we shared similar goals, our interaction felt more functional and ended somewhat abruptly compared to the more personal conversations I had with others.

I made explicit agreements with E, H, and B to watch each other's backs and act as allies during the upcoming rounds. I feel a baseline level of trust with those three due to our shared values, though I remain naturally cautious of everyone since the high stakes could easily shift people's priorities.
